2604.14399.title: SpaceMind: A Modular and Self-Evolving Embodied Vision-Language Agent Framework for Autonomous On-orbit Servicing
2604.14399.paper_summary: Autonomous on-orbit servicing demands embodied agents that perceive through visual sensors, reason about 3D spatial situations, and execute multi-phase tasks over extended horizons. We present SpaceMind, a modular and self-evolving vision-language model (VLM) agent framework that decomposes knowledge, tools, and reasoning into three independently extensible dimensions: skill modules with dynamic routing, Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools with configurable profiles, and injectable reasoning-mode skills. An MCP-Redis interface layer enables the same codebase to operate across simulation and physical hardware without modification, and a Skill Self-Evolution mechanism distills operational experience into persistent skill files without model fine-tuning. We validate SpaceMind through 192 closed-loop runs across five satellites, three task types, and two environments, a UE5 simulation and a physical laboratory, deliberately including degraded conditions to stress-test robustness. Under nominal conditions all modes achieve 90--100% navigation success; under degradation, the Prospective mode uniquely succeeds in search-and-approach tasks where other modes fail. A self-evolution study shows that the agent recovers from failure in four of six groups from a single failed episode, including complete failure to 100% success and inspection scores improving from 12 to 59 out of 100. Real-world validation confirms zero-code-modification transfer to a physical robot with 100% rendezvous success. Code: https://github.com/wuaodi/SpaceMind
2604.14399.paper_summary_zh: 自主的在軌服務需要具備通過視覺感測器感知、對三維空間情況進行推理並執行多階段任務的具體代理。我們提出了 SpaceMind，一個模組化且自我演化的視覺-語言模型 (VLM) 代理框架，將知識、工具和推理分解為三個獨立可擴展的維度：具有動態路由的技能模組、具有可配置配置檔的模型上下文協議 (MCP) 工具，以及可注入的推理模式技能。一個 MCP-Redis 接口層使得相同的代碼庫能夠在模擬和實體硬體上無需修改地運行，而技能自我演化機制則將操作經驗提煉為持久的技能檔案，無需模型微調。我們通過在五顆衛星、三種任務類型和兩個環境（UE5 模擬和實體實驗室）中進行 192 次閉環運行來驗證 SpaceMind，故意包括降級條件以進行強度測試。在正常條件下，所有模式的導航成功率達到 90--100%；在降級情況下，前瞻模式在搜索和接近任務中獨特地成功，而其他模式則失敗。一項自我演化研究顯示，代理在六組中的四組中從單次失敗事件中恢復，包括從完全失敗到 100% 成功，以及檢查分數從 12 提升至 100 分中的 59。現實世界的驗證確認了無需代碼修改即可轉移到實體機器人，並達到 100% 的會合成功率。代碼：https://github.com/wuaodi/SpaceMind
2604.14399.author: Aodi Wu et.al.
2604.14399.authors: Aodi Wu, Haodong Han, Xubo Luo, Ruisuo Wang, Shan He, Xue Wan
